title: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

notes:
This is a [gold]multi-page event[/gold] that locks you into an escalating sequence if you choose to decipher. Each step increases the Max HP cost and presents another chance to continue or give up.

[gold]Decipher Cost Progression[/gold]:
- Initial choice: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP → unlock DECIPHER_1
- Continue: Lose [red]6[/red] Max HP → unlock DECIPHER_2
- Keep: Lose [red]12[/red] Max HP → unlock DECIPHER_3
- KEEP: Lose [red]24[/red] Max HP → unlock DECIPHER_4
- Lose Everything: Lose [red]all remaining Max HP - 1[/red] → unlock DECIPHER_5 (event ends)

[red]Critical difference[/red]: On the final decipher choice, [gold]ALL cards[/gold] in your deck are upgraded instead of just a single random card. This represents achieving the truth at great cost. The game locks decipher options when your Max HP ≤ the cost, preventing lethal damage. From DECIPHER_1 onward, you can always choose [gold]Give Up[/gold] to exit and view the GIVE_UP page.
